evals.prompt: Create an infographic about the rise of AI adoption in business from 2020-2024. Here are the stats: 2020: 15%, 2021: 28%, 2022: 41%, 2023: 67%, 2024: 89%. I want a dark mode style for LinkedIn.
evals.expected_output: A complete PRISM JSON prompt file with exact data points, dark mode color palette with hex codes, 4:5 aspect ratio for LinkedIn, and a negative blocklist embedded in the prompt.

assertions.name: prompt_json_is_valid
assertions.description: prompt.json exists and is parseable JSON

assertions.name: dark_mode_palette_with_hex
assertions.description: Prompt includes a dark background color palette with at least one hex color code

assertions.name: aspect_ratio_linkedin
assertions.description: api_parameters.aspect_ratio is 4:5 or 9:16 (both valid for LinkedIn)

assertions.name: negative_blocklist_present
assertions.description: Prompt contains negative terms like 'blurry text' or 'garbled typography'

evals.prompt: I need an infographic for my sales team showing our Q4 funnel: we started with 1,000 leads, 250 were qualified, we sent 50 proposals, and closed 15 deals. Corporate blue and white style. It's going in a PowerPoint deck.
evals.expected_output: A PRISM JSON prompt with exact funnel numbers (1000→250→50→15), corporate blue/white hex palette, 16:9 aspect ratio for presentation, and generate_kie.py CLI command.

assertions.name: prompt_json_is_valid
assertions.description: prompt.json exists and is parseable JSON

assertions.name: all_funnel_numbers_exact
assertions.description: Prompt contains all 4 exact values: 1000, 250, 50, and 15

assertions.name: corporate_blue_white_palette
assertions.description: Prompt references blue and white colors with hex codes

assertions.name: negative_blocklist_present
assertions.description: Prompt contains negative terms like 'blurry text' or 'garbled typography'

evals.prompt: Make a visual explainer showing the 5 stages of product development: 1. Discovery, 2. Design, 3. Development, 4. Testing, 5. Launch. Bold and colorful style, for Instagram Stories.
evals.expected_output: A PRISM JSON prompt describing all 5 named stages, bold/colorful style, 9:16 aspect ratio for Instagram Stories, and the generate_kie.py command.

assertions.name: prompt_json_is_valid
assertions.description: prompt.json exists and is parseable JSON

assertions.name: all_five_stages_named
assertions.description: Prompt contains all 5 stage names: Discovery, Design, Development, Testing, Launch

assertions.name: bold_colorful_style
assertions.description: Prompt describes bold or colorful visual style

assertions.name: negative_blocklist_present
assertions.description: Prompt contains negative terms like 'blurry text' or 'garbled typography'
